titleStmt.title: No. 890 The Director of the Office of Financial and Development Policy ( Collado ) to the Assistant Secretary of State ( Clayton )Printed from the ribbon copy, which is unsigned.

div.head:
No. 890
The Director of the Office of Financial and Development Policy ( Collado ) to the Assistant Secretary of State ( Clayton )Printed from the ribbon copy, which is unsigned.
div.p:
I have discussed the attached with Admiral Leahy, who tells me he does not know whether the Secretary has talked to the President about the proposed letter from the President to the Secretary of WarSee document No. 884. on German financing, nor whether the President has signed it. He agrees with me, as does Mr. Despres, that in view of the present form of [the] reparations agreement,See documents Nos. 971 and 972. it would be unwise, although
perhaps not absolutely fatal, for the word “facilities” to be included in the first charge sentence of the directive. I have accordingly prepared the attached second sheetThe only attachment to this document is a substitute page 2 which is identical with the final paragraph of document No. 884 except that the word ‘facilities” and the commas preceding and following that word are omitted. The proposed substitution was not made. in which this word is omitted. The Admiral thought perhaps you might be able to have this page substituted whether or not the President has actually signed the original.
